heading: Somu
Kandula
hero.description: AI/product engineer building browser utilities, routing models, Codex pet experiments, and Web3 prototypes. I build small shipped tools: a Chrome AI tab cleaner, Hugging Face prompt-routing and abstention models, Codex pet packages, and Solana/Web3 prototypes.

selectedWork.heading: Small tools, model experiments, and Web3 prototypes.
selectedWork.description: Projects that show the main shape of my work: practical AI utilities, lightweight routing models, developer-facing packages, and blockchain prototypes.

projects.name: Neat
projects.description: Chrome extension for cleaning tab clutter: duplicate removal, stale-tab cleanup, and optional local Chrome AI organization.

projects.name: ixi-pet
projects.description: Codex pet package with a WebP sprite atlas, animation states, preview assets, and README QA previews.

projects.name: prompt-router-distilbert
projects.description: DistilBERT text-classification model trained for prompt routing, LLM routing, and cost-aware routing decisions.

projects.name: context-aware-abstention-qwen-0.5b-v2
projects.description: Qwen2.5 0.5B fine-tune for context-aware abstention behavior, trained with SFT/TRL and tracked with Trackio.

projects.name: Solana/Web3 prototypes
projects.description: TypeScript/Solidity experiments including solflip, anchor-calc, sol-narrative-detector, and eth-contracts.

technicalFocus.heading: The areas I keep building around.
technicalFocus.description: My strongest current work sits at the intersection of browser automation, small ML models, developer tooling, and Web3 prototypes.

focusAreas.title: Routing and abstention models
focusAreas.body: Small model experiments around prompt routing, LLM routing, cost-aware decisions, and context-aware abstention behavior.

focusAreas.title: Browser AI utilities
focusAreas.body: Tools that bring AI into everyday workflows, especially browser-based utilities like tab cleanup and local organization.
focusAreas.source: Chrome Extensions, Manifest V3, Chrome AI

focusAreas.title: Developer-facing packages
focusAreas.body: Reusable artifacts, preview assets, QA-friendly READMEs, and small packages built to be tested and shared.

focusAreas.title: Web3 prototypes
focusAreas.body: TypeScript and Solidity experiments around Solana/Web3 ideas, contract work, and narrative/prototype exploration.

experiments.heading: Focused experiments that explore one technical idea at a time.
experiments.description: These projects are prototypes or experimental artifacts unless explicitly described as shipped tools.

items.label: Voice-agent classifier
items.title: ota-voice-filler-classifier
items.body: Experimental classifier work around voice-agent filler policy and support-style intent behavior.

items.label: Routing dataset
items.title: prompt-router-dataset
items.body: Dataset for prompt-routing and LLM-router classification experiments.

items.label: Image and model spaces
items.title: Hugging Face Spaces
items.body: Small Gradio, static, and Docker spaces used for model demos and visual experiments.

items.label: Crawler prototype
items.title: spidyCrawler
items.body: Python web-crawler prototype built with Scrapy.

contact.heading: Follow the work.
contact.description: The best places to follow my work are GitHub and Hugging Face. I also post and follow AI/Web3 work on X.
